summary: M4 automatic engagement and siege choice loop task is CLOSED after accepted implementation entered origin/main through PR #94 with all required CI checks passing. Child threads were closed, M4-WITHDRAWAL-POSTWAR-HANDOFF-001 was promoted to READY, and goal-mode state now points at the next M4 task.

tests_run.result: Both required PR Gate jobs passed.

decisions: Closed only after PR #94 entered origin/main at the verified main commit.
Promoted the dependency-ready withdrawal/postwar handoff task to READY without modifying product code.
Manual node battle, peace treaty, full diplomacy, and save-format package changes remain outside this task.
risks: M4-WITHDRAWAL-POSTWAR-HANDOFF-001 must reuse accepted M3 governance preview/application boundaries and must not invent a parallel postwar settlement model.
requested_action: Start M4-WITHDRAWAL-POSTWAR-HANDOFF-001 immediately under Autonomous Goal Mode.
